economic_notes: Ozhushk-Onegaming Corporation operates a marina, gas stations and convenience stores. 274164 Ontario Limited o/a The Reef Store by the Lake operates a cannabis store. Both accounted for by modified equity method.
notes: Audit is qualified on two bases: (1) gaming revenue completeness cannot be verified due to lack of dual custody over cash and gaming cards; (2) tangible capital assets are incomplete — the Nation has not gathered a full inventory of all major asset classes as required under PS 3150. Child care expense ($932,593) is reported separately in the statement of operations but mapped under consolidated segments. No schedule of remuneration was included in the document. The auditor firm name is listed only as 'Chartered Professional Accountants, Winnipeg, Manitoba' with no firm name disclosed. Consolidated entities include Golden Eagle Casino and Charitable Entertainment Centre, Wauzhushk Onigum Foundation, and Kinew Day Care. Two GBEs (Ozhushk-Onegaming Corporation and 274164 Ontario Limited o/a The Reef Store by the Lake) are accounted for by modified equity method.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
